tests.source_program:
define i1 @select_fabs_ogt_zero(float %x) {
entry:
  %cond = fcmp oge float %x, 0.0
  %neg = fneg float %x
  %fabs = select i1 %cond, float %x, float %neg
  %cmp = fcmp ogt float %fabs, 0.0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

alive2.src:

  %cmp = fcmp ogt float %fabs, 0.0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define i1 @select_fabs_half_ole_zero(half %x) {
entry:
  %cond = fcmp oge half %x, 0.0
  %neg = fneg half %x
  %fabs = select i1 %cond, half %x, half %neg
  %cmp = fcmp ole half %fabs, 0.0
  ret i1 %cmp
}

target datalayout = "e-m:e-p270:32:32-p271:32:32-p272:64:64-i64:64-f80:128-n8:16:32:64-S128"

define i1 @select_fabs_half_ole_zero(half %x) {
entry:
  %cond = fcmp oge half %x, 0xH0000
  %neg = fneg half %x
  %fabs = select i1 %cond, half %x, half %neg
  %cmp = fcmp ole half %fabs, 0xH0000
  ret i1 %cmp
}

entry:

  %cmp = fcmp ole float %fabs, 0.0

}
